summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sales Reporting feature enhancements. Both backend API and frontend UI are working correctly with unit-level entries and Top 3 best sellers functionality.

minor_issues.issue: Wrong password timeout during testing (but functionality works)
minor_issues.impact: Testing timeout only, not affecting production

parameter_validation.issue: Parameter validation working correctly (422 responses for invalid params)

passed_tests: ✅ Sales Reports API endpoint (/reports/sales) returns correct structure
✅ Net Sales (Total Revenue) calculation and display
✅ Total Units Sold count (12 units from 2 orders)
✅ Top 3 Best Selling Items feature with proper ranking
✅ Unit-level item entries (12 individual entries from orders)
✅ Unit expansion logic (2 pieces = 2 separate entries)
✅ Revenue and counts structure in API response
✅ Frontend reports page loads and renders correctly
✅ Report type filtering (Sales vs All Data)
✅ Top 3 items display with gold/silver/bronze styling
✅ Unit-Level Sales table with individual unit rows
✅ Paid orders filtering for sales reports
